mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM kit WHERE status != 'DELETED'
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY kit_id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kit WHERE status != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM kit WHERE kit_id = #{id} AND status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: UPDATE kit SET name = #{kitDto.name}, manufacturer = #{kitDto.manufacturer}, price = #{kitDto.price}, stock = #{kitDto.stock}, main_image1 = #{kitDto.mainImage1}, main_image2 = #{kitDto.mainImage2}, detail_image = #{kitDto.detailImage}, status = #{kitDto.status} WHERE kit_id = #{kitDto.kitId}
